title: Wado ichimonji from anime One piece
description: Resource pack makes it possible to replace any sword with a Zoro katana from the anime One piece by renaming
body: OptiFine required! ( Rename Any sword to "Wado ichimonji" to use it. ) For support, download this resource pack from my website: [wado_ichimonji.zip](https://mineanimecreations.com/resource-pack/wado_ichimonji.zip) Discord server: discord.gg/z86yJcAZKc. Also check out my other packs: https://modrinth.com/user/MineAnimeCreations
